action_set_definitions.name: get_order_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the processing time, material requirement, and strict deadline for a specified list of production orders.

order_ids.description: The list of order IDs to query (e.g., ['ORD-AL-01', ...]).

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current state of specific workstations, including current setup, machine status, and the size of the downstream buffer/queue.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_setup_change
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a material changeover on a workstation. This action is time-consuming and updates the workstation's setup state.

target_material.description: The material to configure the machine for.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_production_run
action_set_definitions.description: Starts processing a specific order. The workstation must be IDLE and correctly set up for the order's material.

order_id.description: The ID of the order to process.

state_description.current_time_step: The current relative hour/unit of the production shift.
state_description.machines: List of available machines and their current statuses (IDLE, BUSY, MAINTENANCE).
state_description.orders: Queue of production orders including priority and deadline.
state_description.inventory: Current stock levels for various raw materials.
